The Iron Claw (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,611,828Details
International Box Office $10,528,994
Worldwide Box Office $46,140,822
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,920,434
Total $1,920,434
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The true story of the inseparable Von Erich brothers, who made history in the intensely competitive world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s. Through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, the brothers seek larger-than-life immortality on the biggest stage in sports.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,868,370 (13.7% of total gross)
Legs:7.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:77.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,900,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,774 opening theaters/2,774 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,229,458

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2023 (Wide) by A24
International Releases: December 21st, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
January 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Lebanon)
January 4th, 2024 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
January 11th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Iron Claw (СТАЛЬНАЯ ХВАТКА) (Russia (CIS))
January 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: February 13th, 2024 by A24
MPA Rating: R for language, suicide, some sexuality and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2813 (cert #54569), 12/13/2023)
Running Time: 132 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair
Plot point: Biography, Suicide, Wrestling
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1960s, 1970s, 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Access Entertainment, BBC Films, A24
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
